title: SZL Formula Witness Schema
description: Schema the formula_witness field must satisfy in any anatomy-alive span or receipt. Doctrine v6.

formula_id.description: One of the 5 SZL anchor formulas (snake_case canonical form)

lean_theorem_ref.description: Fully qualified Lean 4 theorem identifier. Must start with 'Lutar.' to be grep-verifiable in lutar-lean.

lean_file.description: Relative path within szl-holdings/lutar-lean to the .lean file containing the theorem

lean_commit_sha.description: Full 40-char SHA of the lutar-lean commit where this theorem is verified

inputs_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of canonical JSON of formula inputs

output_summary.description: Key scalar outputs of the formula computation

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when witness was generated

gate_decision.description: Optional: policy gate decision from a11oy if gate fired

dsse_receipt_ref.description: Optional: reference to the DSSE envelope in uds-mesh ledger (SHA-256 of payload)

span_id.description: OTel span_id for the span carrying this witness
